inputs.label: Current Age
inputs.businessContext: The individual's current age in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: The individual's current age in years.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das aktuelle Alter der Person in Jahren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge actuel de l'individu en années.
businessContext_i18n.es: La edad actual del individuo en años.

inputs.label: Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: Age at which individual plans to retire and become eligible for Medicare.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age at which individual plans to retire and become eligible for Medicare.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireyin emekli olmayı ve Medicare'e hak kazanmayı planladığı yaş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter, in dem die Person plant, in Rente zu gehen und Anspruch auf Medicare zu haben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge auquel l'individu prévoit de prendre sa retraite et de devenir éligible à Medicare.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad a la que el individuo planea jubilarse y ser elegible para Medicare.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمر الذي يخطط فيه الفرد للتقاعد ويصبح مؤهلاً لـ Medicare.

inputs.label: Current Annual Medical Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Current annual out-of-pocket medical expenses in US dollars.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current annual out-of-pocket medical expenses in US dollars.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ABD doları cinsinden mevcut yıllık cepten yapılan tıbbi harcamalar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle jährliche Eigenanteilskosten für medizinische Ausgaben in US-Dollar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses médicales annuelles actuelles à votre charge en dollars américains.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos médicos anuales actuales de bolsillo en dólares estadounidenses.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المصروفات الطبية السنوية الحالية من الجيب بالدولار الأمريكي.

inputs.label: Expected Healthcare Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual expected growth rate of medical costs in percent.

label_i18n.fr: Taux d'inflation des soins de santé attendu

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual expected growth rate of medical costs in percent.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tıbbi maliyetlerin yıllık beklenen büyüme oranı (yüzde).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche erwartete Wachstumsrate der medizinischen Kosten in Prozent.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de croissance annuel attendu des coûts médicaux en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de crecimiento anual esperada de los costos médicos en porcentaje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل النمو السنوي المتوقع للتكاليف الطبية بالنسبة المئوية.

inputs.label: Years in Retirement
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of years in retirement during which medical expenses will be incurred.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected number of years in retirement during which medical expenses will be incurred.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tıbbi giderlerin oluşacağı beklenen emeklilik yılı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Anzahl der Jahre im Ruhestand, in denen medizinische Ausgaben anfallen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années de retraite prévues pendant lesquelles des dépenses médicales seront engagées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número esperado de años en jubilación durante los cuales se incurrirán en gastos médicos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العدد المتوقع لسنوات التقاعد التي ستتحمل خلالها المصروفات الطبية.

inputs.label: Expected Investment Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual expected rate of return on savings in percent, used to discount future expenses.

label_i18n.fr: Taux de rendement attendu des investissements
label_i18n.es: Tasa de rendimiento esperada de la inversión

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual expected rate of return on savings in percent, used to discount future expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki giderleri iskonto etmek için kullanılan yıllık beklenen tasarruf getiri oranı (yüzde).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche erwartete Rendite auf Ersparnisse in Prozent, zur Diskontierung zukünftiger Ausgaben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de rendement annuel attendu sur l'épargne en pourcentage, utilisé pour actualiser les dépenses futures.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de rendimiento anual esperada de los ahorros en porcentaje, utilizada para descontar gastos futuros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل العائد السنوي المتوقع على المدخرات بالنسبة المئوية، يستخدم لخصم المصروفات المستقبلية.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
